awards.title: Recognition & Awards
awards.description: Recognized 4 times within first year for high-impact feature delivery, AI-driven CVE automation, and customer demo excellence ("Raise the Bar" & "Put Customers First").

awards.title: Leadership Recognition
awards.description: Recognized by VP, Senior Principal Architect, and Product & Engineering Leadership for high-impact contributions to AI-based CVE automation, cloud cost optimization using telemetry data, and customer-facing demos; commended for delivering beyond assigned scope and ramping quickly on complex backend systems.
